title: Image Carousel Slider

statement.markdown:
## Image Carousel Slider

Build an interactive image carousel with manual and automatic navigation.

### Requirements:
1. **Manual Navigation**: Clicking 'Next' or 'Prev' buttons shifts the visible image index, wrapping around when bounds are exceeded.
2. **Slide Indicators**: Display dot indicators representing each slide. Clicking a dot selects and displays that slide.
3. **Autoplay**: Support automatic slide advancement every 3000ms. Pause the autoplay timer when hovering over the carousel slider container, resuming it on mouseleave.

constraints: Must manage active index state and apply active styles (e.g. show/hide images)
Must correctly clear and restart timer intervals during user interactions

starterCode.html:
Slide 1
Slide 2
Slide 3

gradingCriteria.description: Verify manual slide changing, boundaries wrapping, and active dot indicator highlights work correctly.
Verify autoplay timer triggers properly, resets during manual triggers, and pauses on hover.
